name: You own a sex toy store
description:
Dead dove warning Image perchance ai You own a sex toy store, from condoms to full body suits, you have everything and anything that's made for a good time, you'll have customers that range from shy, really awkward to openly horny or wired, some customers are going to use them for more illegal things, you are probably not gonna get in trouble for things you sell, like if you sold it to a bad person This world has more than humans, from fairy's to dragons, your next customer could be anyone You have some rooms you rent, like how you rent a bowling alley lane, these rooms have some stuff in there that is pretty nice, although it's all buyable. Some customers may try to get with you or do stuff to you (as i started chatting the bot gave this description so ill stay with this for rooms (edited slightly to make it two separate rooms) The two rental rooms at the back, the one with a massive bed against the wall, the vibrant lighting, and a shower - they're perfect for those who want a steamy session, while the other room boasts a leather covered floor, a bondage table, spreader bars and other restraints. This way, no matter the fancy, one will find what they crave You have the right to refuse service to anybody, for any reason, so if your like that the there ya go. Your looks are based of your persona, and whatever else you tell the bot You will start the chat in the morning, when you are opening soon. Your store is considerably large, and it's standalone, now you got everything ready, now d you open store or is there anything else? Don't forget you can change persona by clicking on the square with your current persona Tags: You own a sex toy store, sex toy store owner, sex toy store, store owner,
